reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade â learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: With 53 settled trades the composite signal shows modest positive EV (overall WR 0.60, +1.35 USD) driven by a handful of high-conviction regimes; DOWN_STRONG, trending/Hurst, normal BB, strong ADX, bearish MTF alignment, sell-pressure CVD and 120-240 s TTC all clear n>=8 thresholds with WR comfortably above breakeven and positive realized PnL. Most other slices remain below reliable sample size or show negative PnL, indicating the edge is still narrow and regime-dependent rather than broad. No material change from prior zero-sample state other than accumulation of the first statistically usable cohort.
warnings: All buckets with n<8 ignored per rule; many promising-looking cells (e.g. >=2 z-score) still unusable
overall sample still tiny and single-strategy so risk of overfit to current market regime
changes_since_last: first usable cohort of 53 trades; no prior patterns to compare
focus_next: accumulate more data inside the confirmed buckets above
monitor whether normal-BB + strong-ADX + bearish-MTF intersection sustains WR>0.65
watch for degradation in 120-240 s TTC cohort as sample grows

history.summary: With 53 settled trades (n>=8 threshold applied), confirmed positive EV patterns center on trending Hurst regime (n=50, WR 0.64), normal BB state (n=16, WR 0.875), 120-240s TTC (n=26, WR 0.731), bearish-aligned MTF (n=12, WR 0.833), sell-pressure CVD (n=19, WR 0.737), and DOWN_STRONG signals (n=26, WR 0.692), all showing positive pnl and EV>0.10 after costs. UP direction and >=240s TTC remain marginal or negative despite positive EV in some slices. Sample remains small and observe-only, with no material change from prior zero analyses.

With only 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, bearish MTF alignment, sell-pressure CVD, dead volume, and strong ADX show confirmed positive EV and WR well above breakeven; most other buckets remain too small or mixed to confirm. UP signals, long TTC, active volume, and bullish HTF bias are failing or noisy. Sample is still too limited for robust conclusions.
changes_since_last: No prior analysis provided; first pass on 53 trades

history.summary: With 53 settled trades (n>=8 threshold applied), DOWN_STRONG, trending Hurst, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, bearish_aligned MTF, and sell_pressure CVD show confirmed positive EV and win-rates above breakeven; UP_STRONG and >=240s TTC remain marginal or negative. Overall sample still tiny and observe-only, so most buckets are under-powered. No material change possible without prior_analysis.

With 53 settled trades, confirmed profitable patterns (n>=8, wr>~0.60 with positive EV) center on DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, 120-240s TTC, normal BB state, strong ADX trend, bearish MTF alignment, sell-pressure CVD, dead volume, and -1..1 or -2..-1 z-score; these show consistent positive realized PnL and EV after costs. Most other buckets are either n<8 noise or exhibit negative EV/overfit (e.g., long TTC, active volume, UP signals, expansion/squeeze BB). Bot remains strictly observe-only with no live trading warranted.

With only 53 settled trades, overall WR 60.4% and +1.35 USD pnl show mild positive EV (0.116) but remain statistically fragile; confirmed profitable patterns are limited to n>=8 buckets such as DOWN_STRONG (n=26, WR 69%), trending regime (n=50, WR 64%), 120-240s TTC (n=26, WR 73%), BB normal (n=16, WR 87.5%), and bearish_aligned MTF (n=12, WR 83%). Most other slices are either n<8 or show negative pnl and are treated as noise.
changes_since_last: First analysis; no prior baseline available

history.summary: With n=53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals (n=26, wr=0.692), trending regime (n=50, wr=0.64), normal BB state (n=16, wr=0.875), bearish-aligned MTF (n=12, wr=0.833), 120-240s TTC (n=26, wr=0.731), and sell-pressure CVD (n=19, wr=0.737) show confirmed positive EV after costs above breakeven with n>=8. UP_STRONG, >=240s TTC, active volume, and bullish HTF buckets are failing with negative realized PnL despite some positive avg EV. Sample remains small overall; no prior analysis available for delta.

With 53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes, 120-240s TTC, normal BB state, dead volume, strong ADX, bearish MTF alignment, and sell-pressure CVD show confirmed positive EV (wr 0.65-0.83, n>=12-50) while overall pnl remains near breakeven. UP signals, >=240s TTC, active volume, and mixed MTF are unprofitable or noisy. Sample still too small for most sub-buckets.

With 53 settled trades the composite signal shows modest positive EV (overall WR 0.60, +1.35 USD) driven by a handful of high-conviction regimes; DOWN_STRONG, trending/Hurst, normal BB, strong ADX, bearish MTF alignment, sell-pressure CVD and 120-240 s TTC all clear n>=8 thresholds with WR comfortably above breakeven and positive realized PnL. Most other slices remain below reliable sample size or show negative PnL, indicating the edge is still narrow and regime-dependent rather than broad. No material change from prior zero-sample state other than accumulation of the first statistically usable cohort.
changes_since_last: first usable cohort of 53 trades; no prior patterns to compare

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only â never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only â never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

headlines: Bitcoin drops below $60k with ongoing ETF outflows (IBIT sell wall)
50k+ BTC moved at loss today; capitulation signals building
Weekly death cross forming, mirroring 2022 bear market pattern
BTC at ~$59.3k-$59.5k testing support; failed bounces into outflows

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

last_note.summary: 134 settled trades, 64.2% win-rate, +$61.81 PnL, but profit factor only 1.27 due to avg loss ($4.69) exceeding avg win ($3.34). Sample is too small and context breakdowns show n=1 everywhereâno statistically meaningful edge demonstrated in any dimension. 219/226 execution rejects were 'underdog_price_below_floor', indicating the bot is correctly blocking mispriced underdog entries.

knob_recommendations.reason: n=1 buckets are noise; require 30+ samples before claiming edge in any dimension
1.27 is insufficient; losses are 40% larger than wins, need 2.0+ to overcome execution slippage
219 underdog rejects suggest floor is working; tighten from ~0.50 to 0.52 to reduce mispricing risk

new_lessons.rule: avg_loss > avg_win by 40% indicates adverse selection or poor exit discipline; must fix before scaling
all dimension buckets have n=1; 134 trades spread too thin across feature space to isolate real edge
219/226 execution rejects via underdog_price_below_floor shows gate is catching mispricing; maintain strict floor
profit_factor 1.27 < 1.5 threshold; positive PnL alone is not evidence of edge with small n and fat left tail

research_loop.note: strategy-layer research meta-loop: independent model proposes exploit/avoid contexts + bounded knob nudges + lessons. Observe-only unless auto_apply (whitelisted+bounded). PAPER ONLY.

recent.rule: 64% win rate is irrelevant when losses are 1.4x wins; payoff asymmetry must favor the bot or edge erodes to zero
When one filter (underdog_price_floor) rejects 97% of candidates, it's likely trained on noiseârelax incrementally and A/B test
BTC 5-min is near-efficient; absent nâ¥100 samples showing 70%+ win rate AND positive payoff ratio per context, assume no edge exists
If >95% of execution rejects share single reason, that gate is bottleneck masking true feature performance â relax incrementally and re-measure
1.27 profit factor means a few adverse winsâlosses flip net negative; require â¥1.5 and avg_win > avg_loss before claiming robust edge
Dimensional breakdowns with n=1 provide zero statistical power; enforce nâ¥30 per bucket before action
219/226 execution rejects from single rule (underdog_price_below_floor) suggests overfitting or miscalibrationârelax incrementally and measure realized edge
avg_loss > avg_win violates Kelly; enforce max_loss_usd cap OR require win_rate â¥ 0.70 when loss_size > win_size
avg_loss > avg_win by 40% indicates adverse selection or poor exit discipline; must fix before scaling
all dimension buckets have n=1; 134 trades spread too thin across feature space to isolate real edge
219/226 execution rejects via underdog_price_below_floor shows gate is catching mispricing; maintain strict floor
profit_factor 1.27 < 1.5 threshold; positive PnL alone is not evidence of edge with small n and fat left tail

tradingview.stop_condition: ingest only â never trade authority

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop + a liveness watchdog (last_beat_age_s/stalled). PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: arb halt only on anomaly (guaranteed_profit<=0); risk-free P&L is segregated

dependency_arbitrage.note: Lane B halt on booking anomaly only; walk-forward is observability

stop_conditions.note: quantitative kill switches checked each tick from settled ledger evidence; NOT the LLM's opinion. Halting blocks NEW entries only.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: risk-free dutch book: BUY-both (asks<$1) + SELL-both (mint $1 set, sell bids>$1); deterministic P&L; NEVER blended into directional. PAPER ONLY.

last_violations.description: 15m up-mid below nested 5m up-mid: P(up_15m) cannot be < P(up_5m) for overlapping window

dependency_arbitrage.note: LCMM nested-window scanner + optional paper execution on validated nested_implication violations.

arb_graph.note: Graph is rebuilt each tick from open windows; Grok edges are never tradable alone.

accepted_dependencies.description: Both 5m windows (8:05-8:10 and 8:10-8:15) lie strictly inside the 15m window (8:00-8:15).

baseline_cohort_gate.note: baseline quant path: 180-240s TTC band (scaled on 15m), high edge + strong CEX; UP blocked until promoted; green_path=15m DOWN cohort only (TV observe-only)

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective â never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

bucket_evidence.rule: blocked iff confidently_losing AND fdr_significant (Wilson upper < breakeven, PF < min, BH-FDR q=0.10)

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only â they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades â never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

down_bias_gate.note: restrict-only: harvest DOWN/TV asymmetry by blocking proven-losing UP stacks

mtf_gate.note: observe-only conflict veto: blocks 4m/5m fast-pair conflict only (loop arch default). require_confirm/side_align are opt-in restrict-only layers, not trade authority.

confidence_tier.note: At 15m TTC sweet spot, TV MTF regime adjusts min_edge/max_price only. TV trade gates remain off per operator lock.

Bitcoin Up or Down - June 28, 8:00PM-8:15PM ET

tv_confidence_tier.note: TV confidence tier modulates min_edge/max_price only; never forces or blocks.

grok_decision.rationale: CEX lead favors UP but payoff breakeven 0.17 not cleared reliably; TV weak and not in_entry_band; prefer abstain.
grok_decision.tv_read: partial_up_mtf on fresh 3m/4m UP_WEAK; 2m stale UP_STRONG ignored per MTF rule.
grok_decision.mispricing_read: up divergence 0.1375 confirmed but tv_confirms=false so edge muted.
